name: @diffity
description: GitHub-style git diff viewer in the browser

scripts.test: npm run test -w @diffity/parser && npm run test -w @diffity/ui
scripts.release:patch: npm run build && bumpp patch --no-push -C packages/cli && npm publish -w packages/cli
scripts.release:minor: npm run build && bumpp minor --no-push -C packages/cli && npm publish -w packages/cli
scripts.release:major: npm run build && bumpp major --no-push -C packages/cli && npm publish -w packages/cli
scripts.release:pre: npm run build && bumpp prerelease --no-push -C packages/cli && npm publish -w packages/cli --tag next
scripts.release: npm run build && bumpp --no-push -C packages/cli && npm publish -w packages/cli
